login.title: Sign in
login.body: Use your platform account to continue.

login.empty: No sign-in methods are currently available.

providerHelp.azure: Continue with your Microsoft work or school account.

logSearch.label: Log search
logSearch.description: Search structured platform logs by request, trace, tenant, or text

validation.tooShort: Display name must be at least 2 characters
validation.tooLong: Display name must be 120 characters or fewer

adminLogs.title: Log search
adminLogs.subtitle: Search structured platform logs by request, trace, tenant, actor, or text.
adminLogs.error: Log search is unavailable. Try again shortly.

prompt.title: Search platform logs
prompt.description: Set filters and run a search to see matching log entries.

empty.title: No logs matched
empty.description: No log entries matched the current filters and time range.

error.signInAgain: Please sign in again to continue.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

card.membersDescription: Invite people, change roles, and remove members.

card.readinessDescription: See what's configured and what's left to set up.

config.title: Configuration

appName.label: Application name
appName.description: Display name shown to this tenant's users.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Default colour theme for this tenant.

sessionWarning.label: Session expiry warning
sessionWarning.description: Warn users before their session expires.

webhookHeaders.label: Webhook headers
webhookHeaders.description: Default headers attached to outbound webhooks (JSON).

overview.title: Administration
overview.description: Manage your organisation's members, authentication, and features.
overview.empty: You do not have access to any administration sections.

members.title: Members
members.description: People with access to this organisation.
members.inviteError: The invitation could not be sent. Please try again.
members.usernameError: The username could not be saved. Please try again.
members.auditTrailDeferred: Per-member audit trail: search the admin log by actor (deferred).

features.title: Features
features.description: Enable or disable platform capabilities for this tenant.

keyDescription.audit_export: Export audit events to external systems.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Login options and security policy for this organisation.
auth.notConfigured: This is not configured for your organisation yet.

providers.enabledLabel: Sign-in options offered to your users
providers.noneAvailable: No third-party sign-in providers are available in this environment.

idps.deleteConfirm: Delete the identity provider "{alias}"? Users will no longer be able to sign in through it.
idps.createError: Could not create the identity provider. Check the fields and try again.
idps.updateError: Could not update the identity provider. Please try again.
idps.deleteError: Could not delete the identity provider. Please try again.
idps.clientSecretEditHelper: Leave blank to keep the existing secret.
idps.testError: Could not run the connection test. Please try again.

testResult.ok: Connection OK — issuer and signing keys validated.
testResult.issuer_mismatch: Issuer mismatch — the discovery issuer does not match.
testResult.jwks_invalid: No usable signing keys were found at the JWKS endpoint.
testResult.unreachable: The provider endpoint could not be reached.
testResult.invalid_document: The discovery document was invalid or incomplete.
testResult.not_configured: No issuer is configured for this provider yet.

idps.discoveryHelper: Paste the provider's issuer; we validate it and fill the endpoints below.
idps.discoveryError: Could not import the discovery document. Check the URL and try again.
idps.mappingHelper: Map upstream claims to user attributes and to tenant roles. Applied to the identity provider; not yet exercised through a live login.
idps.mappingError: Could not save the mapping. Please try again.

mfa.saveError: Could not save the MFA policy. Please try again.

session.saveError: Could not save the session policy. Please try again.
session.invalid: Enter a whole number within the allowed range.

readiness.heading: Authentication settings status
readiness.configured: Editing is enabled — the realm-admin credential is active.
readiness.missing_credential: Editing is unavailable: no identity credential is configured for your organisation. Please contact your system administrator to provision one.
readiness.invalid_credential: Editing is unavailable: the identity credential was rejected. Please contact your system administrator to rotate it.
readiness.forbidden_realm_operation: Editing is unavailable: the identity credential lacks the required permissions. Please contact your system administrator.
readiness.realm_unreachable: Editing is unavailable: the identity service could not be reached. Please try again later, or contact your system administrator if this persists.

readiness.title: Tenant readiness
readiness.description: Track every control-plane capability and drive this tenant to fully configured.

overallHint.ready: This tenant is fully configured and usable.
overallHint.blocked: Required setup is missing — the tenant is not yet usable.
overallHint.degraded: A required capability is misconfigured and needs attention.
overallHint.unknown: Some capabilities could not be checked.

tenant_record.label: Tenant record
tenant_record.description: The organisation exists in the platform.

tenant_fqdn.label: Tenant domain
tenant_fqdn.description: The tenant's hostname is known and resolvable.

tenant_admin.label: Tenant administrators
tenant_admin.description: At least one active administrator can manage the tenant.
tenant_admin.action: Invite an administrator from the Members section.

member_administration.label: Member administration
member_administration.description: Invite people, change roles, and remove members.

roles_permissions.label: Roles & permissions
roles_permissions.description: Role-based access control for tenant members.

auth_credential.label: Identity credential
auth_credential.description: The realm-admin credential that lets this tenant manage its own authentication.
auth_credential.action: Contact your system administrator to provision or rotate the credential.

auth_providers.label: Login providers
auth_providers.description: Which sign-in options are offered to your users.

mfa_policy.label: Multi-factor authentication
mfa_policy.description: Whether and how a second factor is required.

idp_configuration.label: Identity providers
idp_configuration.description: External OIDC / social identity providers for single sign-on.
idp_configuration.action: Add an identity provider if external login is expected.

feature_config.label: Features & configuration
feature_config.description: Feature flags and governed configuration values.

audit.label: Audit trail
audit.description: Who changed what, when, across the control plane.

observability.label: Observability
observability.description: Logs, traces, and dashboards for the tenant.

oidc_discovery.label: OIDC discovery
oidc_discovery.description: Configure providers from an OIDC discovery URL.

oidc_claim_mapping.label: Claim mapping
oidc_claim_mapping.description: Map provider claims to user attributes.

oidc_group_role_mapping.label: Group / role mapping
oidc_group_role_mapping.description: Map provider groups to tenant roles.

oidc_test_connection.label: Test connection
oidc_test_connection.description: Verify a provider configuration before saving.

oidc_callback_display.label: Callback URL
oidc_callback_display.description: Show the redirect/callback URL to configure at the provider.

oidc_login_simulation.label: Login simulation
oidc_login_simulation.description: Simulate a login to validate the end-to-end flow.
